title: Villain Drive
note: The agenda a recurring antagonist pursues on a Clock (even offscreen). Pair with statgen.py villain for Ultima Points; tie the drive to a PC's Theme or Bond for JRPG stakes.

entries.value: Conquest — dominion over a land, people, or throne
Revenge for an old wound or betrayal
Forbidden knowledge or power, at any cost
Restore a lost past — undo a death, a fall, a ruined empire
Purge the world of a corruption only they perceive
Greed — wealth, resources, a monopoly on something vital
Devotion to a dark god or cosmic force
Escape or unmake their own suffering — dragging the world with them
Prove supremacy over a rival, a people, or fate itself
Twisted love — possession of a person or an ideal
